title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!
